note: RAW measurements only — no verdicts; the verifier judges
disclosed_block_source: the DF-RUN-CONTRACT block printed by the run (identical to the three surfaces)

tokens.method: orchestration-harness per-agent report (includes per-call system context); same method+caveat as the recorded baseline runs (L2.5)

wall_time_raw.confound_note_from_protocol: protocol pre-registered summing both segments; a resumed run re-reads kit context twice and the continuation added a third context load — the recorded baseline runs were single continuous sessions
